comment.text: This key displays the price per gigabyte of storage in the order summary section of the Portal Settings. It appears as a label next to the formatted storage price value, helping users understand the cost of additional storage. Translators should ensure the translated text accurately reflects a price unit.

usage.context:
) : null}
{t("PricePerGB")} {formatWalletCurrency!(storagePriceIncrement, 2)}
